sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9994" key="a)ntikatamu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντικατα-μύω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n9994.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shut one's eyes in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
